zh.Clannaboy, Antrim, Ulster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech於1230年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親O'Neill26歲，母親Cecily MacLochlain23歲。他於1263年與Eleanor de Angulo在愛爾蘭武爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1281年登記服兵役。他去世於1283年在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍享年53歲。

zh-hans.Clannaboy, Antrim, Ulster, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech于1230年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲O'Neill26岁，母亲Cecily MacLochlain23岁。他于1263年与Eleanor de Angulo在爱尔兰武爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1281年登记服兵役。他去世于1283年在爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .

nameMeanings.name: Aedh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Old Irish name Áed, meaning ‘fire’; the name of the Celtic sun god and a common personal name from the earliest times.

nameMeanings.name: 'Hugh'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech was born in 1230, in Ireland, his father, O'Neill, was 26 and his mother, Cecily MacLochlain, was 23. He married Eleanor de Angulo in 1263, in Ulster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1281. He died in 1283, in County Tyrone, Ireland, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech est né en 1230, à Irlande, son père, O'Neill, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecily MacLochlain, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Angulo en 1263, à Ulster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1281. Il est décédé en 1283, à County Tyrone, Irlande, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech 1230 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater O'Neill 26 und seine Mutter Cecily MacLochlain 23. Er hat 1263 in Ulster, Irland Eleanor de Angulo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1281 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 53 Jahren in County Tyrone, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech è nato il nel 1230 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, O'Neill, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Cecily MacLochlain, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Angulo nel 1263, nel Ulster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1281. Morì nel 1283, nel County Tyrone, Irlanda, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Clannaboy, Antrim, Ulster, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ アントリム
ja.County Tyrone, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ トイロン
ja.lifeSummary: Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailechが1230年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父O'Neillは26歳，母Cecily MacLochlainは23歳であった。1263年にアイルランドウルスターでEleanor de Anguloと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年に兵役登録をした。彼は1283年にアイルランドコウントイ トイロンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech(이)가 1230년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 O'Neill(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily MacLochlain(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1263년 아일랜드 울스터에서 Eleanor de Angulo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1283년 아일랜드 카운티 타이론에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech nasceu em 1230, em Irlanda, seu pai, O'Neill, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Cecily MacLochlain, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Angulo em 1263, em Ulster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1281. Ele faleceu em 1283, em County Tyrone, Irlanda, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech родился в 1230 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени O'Neill было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily MacLochlain, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Angulo в 1263 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1281 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1283 г. в местности коунти тироун, Ирландия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aedh Buidhe 'Hugh' O'Neill, King of Ailech nació en 1230, en Irlanda, su papá, O'Neill, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Cecily MacLochlain, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Angulo en 1263, en Ulster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1281. Murió en 1283, en County Tyrone, Irlanda, a la edad de 53 años.
